explanations.pt-br: Explicacao do bug: '.' nao match newline sem DOTALL.
explanations.en-us: Bug explanation: '.' doesn't match newline without DOTALL.

explanations.pt-br: Solucao 1: usar re.DOTALL flag no search.
explanations.en-us: Solution 1: use re.DOTALL flag in search.

explanations.pt-br: Solucao 2: usar [\s\S] que match tudo incluindo newline.
explanations.en-us: Solution 2: use [\s\S] which matches everything including newline.
